summary: Note Tab + Mods-only Note + History. Migrates all note-tab literal hex/rgba to GAM_TOK (inline cssText / JS-assigned .style.color) and var(--gam-tok-*) (style rules). Adds card-level editing-vs-saved state (warm-accent/amber left-border while dirty, success on save, success-soft flash + persistent saved micro-chip, pencil->check->alert icon swap) by converting mountModNote setStatus(txt,color) into a semantic setStatus(txt,state) helper that toggles .is-dirty/.is-saved on .gam-mc-note. Surfaces the 500-char threshold proactively (a fill track that climbs toward warn + a visible '/500' label). Swaps the clear-all emoji to a consistent trash glyph. Adds min-width:0 clamps on the meta row so long mod-name+timestamp can't break flex alignment. Adds a subtle bottom fade to long history-row bodies beyond the existing ellipsis. Note-history active left-rail and textarea focus retoned from the legacy blue C.ACCENT (#4A9EFF) to the brand amber accent token.

edits.note: Convert the inline-hex setStatus into a semantic state helper. Removes the raw-color contract (no literal hex passed in) and drives the card-level editing/saved/error state + icon swap (visual transformation #1). All 6 call sites below switch from hex to a state name.

edits.oldString:
ta.disabled = false;
          setStatus('load failed; you can still type to save', '#a0a8b6');
edits.newString:
ta.disabled = false;
          setStatus('load failed; you can still type to save', 'saving');
edits.note: load-failure soft note: keep the muted-ink tone (saving->inkMuted) instead of literal #a0a8b6.
saving state -> inkMuted, drops #a0a8b6; keeps the .is-dirty card border while the write is in flight.

Success path -> 'saved' (success token + .is-saved flash + check icon, drops #7fd67f); the else branch -> 'error' (danger token, drops #ff6b6b). Anchored with the cache-invalidate block so this #ff6b6b occurrence is unique vs the catch-branch one.
catch-branch save error -> 'error' (danger token), drops the second #ff6b6b. Anchored with catch(e){ ... } finally { to disambiguate from the else-branch occurrence above.
editing/dirty state -> warn token (amber while dirty, pencil icon), drops the final #a0a8b6.

edits.oldString: Note history (loading...) · newest first
edits.newString: Note history (loading...) · newest first
edits.note: renderNoteTab is a template literal; the 'newest first' label literal #9b9892 -> GAM_TOK.inkMuted via string concat inside the backtick. Accessible text '\u00b7 newest first' preserved; id=mc-note-count untouched.

edits.oldString: <button class="gam-btn gam-btn-cancel" id="mc-note-clear-all" style="font-size:10px;padding:3px 8px" title="Archive prior notes with a marker entry (history preserved, visually divided)">\u{1F9F9} Clear all</button>
edits.newString: <button class="gam-btn gam-btn-cancel" id="mc-note-clear-all" style="font-size:10px;padding:3px 8px" title="Archive prior notes with a marker entry (history preserved, visually divided)">\u{1F5D1}\u{FE0E} Clear all</button>
edits.note: Visual transformation #3: swap the \u{1F9F9} broom for a consistent trash glyph \u{1F5D1} (wastebasket, matches the \u{1F5D1} Remove glyph used elsewhere in the console). \u{FE0E} text-variation selector keeps it monochrome/consistent. Accessible name ' Clear all' preserved; id=mc-note-clear-all untouched.

edits.newString: 0 / 500
edits.note: Visual transformation #2: add a proactive char-fill track (.gam-mc-note-chartrack > #mc-note-charfill) above the counter and surface the 500 threshold as a visible '/500' label. Counter literal #9b9892 -> GAM_TOK.inkMuted (template-literal concat). id=mc-note-charcount preserved; new id mc-note-charfill is additive.

Visual transformation #2: drive the fill track + '/500' label, and migrate the JS-assigned counter color literals (var(--bb-amber-warm,#f0a040) and #9b9892) to GAM_TOK.warn / GAM_TOK.inkMuted. Track fills amber toward the 500 threshold (accent -> accent-line >=80% -> warn over-cap).

Migrate .gam-mc-note-ta / :focus / -status hex (C.BG2/TEXT/BORDER/ACCENT/TEXT3) to var(--gam-tok-*). Retone textarea focus from legacy blue C.ACCENT(#4A9EFF) to brand amber accent. Append: status glyph swap (pencil/check/alert) keyed on [data-icon]; card-level .is-dirty/.is-saved state (amber/success left rail + success-soft flash + persistent 'saved' micro-chip via ::after); and the char-fill track (visual transformations #1 and #2). Anchored on the existing -ta/-status block (unique).

Migrate history-row hex (C.BG2/BORDER/ACCENT/TEXT2/TEXT/TEXT3) to var(--gam-tok-*). Retone the active left-rail from legacy blue C.ACCENT(#4A9EFF) to brand amber accent. Add #4 meta min-width:0 clamps (mod-name ellipsis, time pinned right, both nowrap) and #5 a subtle bottom fade-mask on long bodies. Note-time ink lifted from C.TEXT3 to ink-muted for WCAG. Anchored on the contiguous history block (unique).
